feedback.text: Hi, I'd really love to see that if I buy a game, I can keep playing the game.. Now, some publishers stop me from playing games I bought in the past because they pull their servers offline. It should be mandatory for game developers and publishers to make it easie for buyers of their products to run their own servers if need be. It would be nice if the digital fairness act includes this within their scope. Thank you. With kind regards, Stefan
